text:
Market today: Tech names are sensitive to big tech spending and inflation news. The big spending spree is a tailwind, but inflation falling could be a double-edged sword.

Your holdings: SOXL is a SELL at -35.72% - it's a leveraged ETF that decays, and it's marked for attention. SPAL is also a TRIM at -35.27% for the same reasons. QQQI is a TRIM at -1.71% - income anchor, but could be trimmed if needed.

Watch: Keep an eye on inflation data. If it falls faster than expected, it could impact Fed policy and tech sentiment.

Bottom line: Focus on managing your leveraged positions and watching inflation signals.
plays: SOXL: TRIM or SELL. Leveraged ETFs decay, and this one is marked for attention.
SPAL: TRIM or SELL. Similar to SOXL, this leveraged ETF needs attention.
No new buys today - hold and watch
